相关PoC:
CVE-2026-31802: Demonstrate and analyze the CVE-2026-31802 path traversal vulnerability in npm tar, enabling arbitrary file overwrite via symlink extraction.

CVE-2026-2472-Vertex-AI-SDK-Google-Cloud: Expose and detail an unauthenticated stored XSS vulnerability in the Google Cloud Vertex AI Python SDK affecting versions 1.98.0 to 1.130.9.
